channel.title: Multi-Cloud on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Multi-Cloud on Arrans github.io

item.title: minio/minio
item.description: MinIO is a high-performance, S3 compatible object store, open sourced under GNU AGPLv3 license.

item.title: google/go-cloud
item.description: The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK): A library and tools for open cloud development in Go.
